title: Whimsy Brews
description: Run your own Tea shop or a Brewery, discover new Origin Races and explore redesigned Biomes, Worlds and Mobs in this cozy lightweight MC Modpack!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a9dfeee8688d95852d31187da731a1204570c5.png)

Enter the land of whimsy, where adventure and coziness go hand in hand! Prepare to embark on a peaceful journey in a world powered by **YUNG's Better** exploration mods, **Let's Do** series and the unparalleled creativity of the **Create** mod.

Pick and choose from a variety of **Race Origins** that completely alter the gameplay you will experience. From the tinniest Dwarf race to an enormous Troll with ravenous appetite.

Overworld now has some soothing **ambient sounds and particles**, vanilla friendly **biome redesigns** and variety of **new mobs and structures**. If you're looking for a more deadly experience, you can hop through the portals and even visit a unique **Sleepy Hollows** biome with mysterious bosses.

Perfect for playing with friends!

![mod list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a8842ed84252d4d5fda99cadc3b9a4999ca2b2.png)

> **Other Mods:** Amendments, MrCrayfish's Furniture, Ribbits, Lootr, HT's Tree Chop, Carry On, Corpse, 3D Skin Layers, Visual Workbench, Jade, JEI, Traveler's Titles, etc..  

> **Resource packs:** 3D Crops Revamped, Fresh Animations, Colourful Containers GUI, Enchant Icons, **[Mizuno 16 Craft](https://resourcepack.net/mizunos-16-craft-resource-pack/#gsc.tab=0)**

> **Shaders:** Complementary Shaders - Unbound

![separation line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b8176c1401942d8ef88f5a7d68633ea1460f297.png)

This Modpack was made for my Community Minecraft server that makes the most out of the Discord Integration mod and includes special Journals to enhance its RPG feel. You will also encounter monthly challenges, community boss fights and other fun events.

You will have to add **[Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)** and **[Sit & Chill](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sit-chill)** mods manually to play on the server.

Join the **[Herbal Brews Discord](https://discord.gg/yhzK7S5nAQ)** for more information.
